title: 破镜谋杀案
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\137-破镜谋杀案-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Miss Marple discusses aging and the difficulties of needlework with Dr. Huddock. After Huddock suggests she try "reversing" her work like Penelope, he leaves, jokingly prescribing her a "stimulating murder mystery." Miss Knight arrives shortly after, and Miss Marple notes that while Miss Knight believes murder is unlikely in such a remote location, a murder does eventually occur.

In a separate setting, Lady Bunty prepares to visit Gosington Hall, a house she once knew. She has been invited to tea by Mrs. Marina Greg, who sent a handwritten note mentioning a previous meeting in California. As Lady Bunty approaches the house, she observes the improvements made to the property and feels nostalgic for the iris beds she once loved.

Upon entering the library, Lady Bunty finds Mrs. Greg and her husband, Jason Rad (also called Goldie), seated at a tea table. Mrs. Greg expresses her deep desire to settle in the English countryside permanently, viewing the house as her true home. While Jason Rad offers affectionate support, he privately considers the Victorian house ugly and the location inconvenient, doubting whether Marina will remain enthusiastic about the move for long. Mrs. Greg greets Lady Bunty warmly, acknowledging the coincidence of their meeting and apologizing for the changes made to the house, which previously belonged to the late Colonel Bunty.
